name: Crostini
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to broil.
2. Place the oven rack low and line a sheet pan with baking parchment.
3. Mix minced garlic and crushed red pepper flakes with extra virgin olive oil. Let flavors settle while slicing bread.
4. Slice the baguette loaf into 1/3 inch slices and brush the oil mixture on one side of each slice.
5. Toast oiled sides until golden brown. Turn over and toast plain sides as well.
6. Allow to cool completely before storing in an airtight container. Crostini freezes well.
7. To prepare Mozzarella Basil Crostini:
- Chill mozzarella and slice thinly.
- Warm mozzarella to room temperature.
- Place basil leaf diagonally on each crostini, then place a slice of mozzarella centered atop the leaf.
8. To prepare Roasted Garlic Crostini:
- Remove garlic from oil mixture for this version.
- Place a clove of roasted garlic on each crostini and gently mash slightly.
